message:
feat(fcp-protocol): add FCPC control-plane integration tests

Add comprehensive integration tests proving FCPC frames can carry
InvokeRequest/Response and receipts end-to-end. This satisfies the
acceptance criterion for task 1n78.13:

- invoke_request_round_trip_through_fcpc: Request seal/open round-trip
- invoke_response_round_trip_through_fcpc: Response with receipt IDs
- error_response_with_decision_receipt_round_trip: Error responses
- bidirectional_invoke_conversation: Full request/response exchange
- invoke_objects_have_required_retention: Retention classification
- receipt_objects_have_required_retention: Receipt retention
- health_objects_have_ephemeral_retention: Ephemeral objects
- replay_protection_for_invoke_requests: Anti-replay enforcement

All 8 tests pass, demonstrating library-level integration between
fcp-core, fcp-protocol, and fcp-cbor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
